untranslatable_reason: Pattern-based detection (flag formation with down-sloping trend lines, vertical rise phase, multi-phase volume behavior, and specific breakout confirmation) requires structural pattern recognition not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal requires: (1) identification of flag geometric structure with two trend lines, (2) discrimination of vertical rise vs flag drift phases, (3) precise volume taper sequencing across phases, and (4) breakout confirmation from flag support. These multi-bar structural patterns cannot be expressed using only single-bar price/volume indicators and standard technical indicators. A pattern-detection module or multi-bar trend line validator would be required.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using volume taper (vol_ratio_20 < 1.0) and upward momentum (close > prev_close with elevated volume), but this does not capture the essential High and Tight Flag pattern structure. The signal requires dedicated flag pattern recognition capabilities.
